## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Launch in direction '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Level share-code (if applicable)

If the bug happens on a specific level, paste its share-code here so we can reproduce it.

```
<paste share-code>
```

## Screenshots or recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a short clip.

## Environment

- Device: [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 14]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, iOS 17]
- Browser and version: [e.g. Chrome 120]

## Additional context

Anything else that might help.
